design_philosophy: Modern Minimal Professional UI tailored for Senior Citizen Accessibility. Focuses on nature-inspired organic colors, high-contrast typography, large touch targets, and frictionless navigation. Eliminates cognitive overload with soft shadows, rounded cards, and smooth, meaningful animations.

rules: Use minimum 18px equivalent for critical body text to ensure senior citizen readability.
Do not use gray text on gray backgrounds.
Use generous padding (p-6 or p-8) inside cards.
Mobile-first: Implement single-column flows for checkout and settings.
Bottom Navigation for mobile to accommodate thumb-zone accessibility.
Grid layout: Use 'Bento' grid style for dashboards to maintain density but clear separation.

cards.style: Rounded corners (rounded-2xl), soft ambient shadows in light mode, subtle 1px border in dark mode.

buttons.style: Large touch targets (min h-12 or h-14). Fully rounded or rounded-xl.

inputs.style: Large tap areas, clear focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2), rounded-xl, 1px solid border.

navigation.mobile: Bottom navigation bar for critical paths.

rules: Use Framer Motion for smooth layout transitions.
Stagger list items slightly on load.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button').
Guest checkout must be default or highly visible.
Add aria-labels to all icon-only buttons.
Avoid hover-only menus; ensure click/tap to open.

icons.style: Stroke-based, clear, slightly thicker (strokeWidth={2.5}) for better visibility.

hero_images.description: Three farmers cultivate rural fields at sunrise. Use for main landing hero.
Farmer silhouette at sunrise. Use for auth backgrounds or success stories.

category_images.description: Basket of fresh organic vegetables for organic farming section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components but override border radii to be more rounded (e.g., rounded-2xl).
Ensure dark mode is fully implemented using Tailwind's dark: variant.
Implement language switcher and theme toggle in the main header.
For the AI Chat Assistant, use a floating action button (FAB) that expands into a clean, simple chat window.
Build multi-role dashboards using CSS Grid, ensuring data is legible with large typography.
Ensure the hero section uses the provided hero images with a semi-transparent gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/40) so the white text is readable.
Include data-testid on every button, input, and interactive card.
